vocab.meaning: sự chính trực trong nghệ thuật (giữ vững bản sắc cá nhân)
vocab.example: To be a true artist, one must maintain artistic integrity regardless of market trends.

vocab.meaning: thu hút/làm say đắm khán giả
vocab.example: The idea of creating something that can truly captivate the audience is what appeals to me most.

vocab.meaning: cách tiếp cận độc đáo/khác biệt
vocab.example: I think I would enjoy being an artist because I tend to take an unconventional approach to problem-solving.

vocab.meaning: sự đồng điệu/vang vọng về cảm xúc
vocab.example: Great art is characterized by its emotional resonance, connecting deeply with people from all walks of life.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng phong phú/sống động
vocab.example: While I have a vivid imagination, translating those mental images into physical art is a separate challenge.
A career in the arts would certainly foster creativity in a way that most office jobs cannot.

vocab.meaning: kìm hãm tài năng của ai đó
vocab.example: I fear that focusing too much on the commercial side of art might stifle one’s raw talent.
Traveling around the world would be my primary source of inspiration if I were to pursue a career as a painter.
I would love to produce sculptures that evoke a sense of peace and nostalgia in the viewer.

vocab.meaning: người có tầm nhìn nghệ thuật
vocab.example: It takes more than just skill to be an artistic visionary who can change the course of art history.
